## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed
- what phase, version, or scope this belongs to

## Branch Context

- milestone branch:
- scoped branch:
- roadmap or phase reference:

## Verification

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] docs updated when behavior changed

## Change Type

- [ ] feature
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] release / workflow

## Notes For Reviewers

- user-visible behavior changes:
- architectural changes:
- file splits or branch-management changes:
